docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,812.50 FILED BY KUO, JANET A DBA CAMPUS CONNECTION NGUYEN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDEN, STEPHANIE LAW OFF/OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO STEPHANIE BOLDEN -LAW OFFCS. OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN RETURNED SIGNED;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUO, JANET A DBA CAMPUS CONNECTION NGUYEN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDEN, STEPHANIE LAW OFF/OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN $2,712.50 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,738.50, PLAINTIFF, NGUYEN, MICHAEL IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDEN, STEPHANIE LAW OFF/OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDEN, STEPHANIE LAW OFF/OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN HEARING SET FOR JUN-03-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION & OPPOSI- TION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM ALAMEDA COUNTY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION & NOTICE OF OPPOSITION SERVED ON ALAMEDA COUNTY SHERIFF & DEFT BOLDEN, FILED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JUN-03-1999, DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDEN, STEPHANIE LAW OFF/OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EAR NINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD
TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE LEVYING OFFICER TO RELEASE $500 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR & THE REMAINDER TO
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE PARTIES STIPULATED THAT THE COURT CAN ORDER MONTHLY PAYMENTS. THEREFORE, DEBTOR TO PAY $100 PER MONTH BEGINNING 7/1/99.
PAYMENTS DUE BY THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $500.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDEN, STEPHANIE LAW OFF/OF STEPHANIE BOLDEN
